LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Enclave.label: The Enclave
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Enclave.description: Ruthless remnants of the old world government, the Enclave believe themselves to be humanity’s rightful rulers. Isolated, technologically advanced, and fiercely nationalistic, they seek to restore civilization under their iron-fisted vision—no matter the cost to outsiders.
